languages.text: "Только скажите — и мы установим вам лучшие из аугментов, Лорд-капитан!"
"Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Только скажите — и мы установим вам лучшие из аугментов, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"
"Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"
"Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: 「おっしゃれば、我らが最高の強化を施しましょう、艦長様！」
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: 「おっしゃれば、我らが最高の強化を施しましょう、艦長様！」

languages.text: “您一声令下，我们就为您装配最顶级的植入物，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “您一声令下，我们就为您装配最顶级的植入物，舰长大人！”

languages.text: « Nous nous tenons prêts à vous installer nos meilleures augmentations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, il suffit de demander ! »
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: « Nous nous tenons prêts à vous installer nos meilleures augmentations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, il suffit de demander ! »

languages.text: «¡Pídanoslo y le implantaremos nuestros mejores aumentos, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Pídanoslo y le implantaremos nuestros mejores aumentos, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: "Siz emredin, en iyi ogmentlerimizi takalım Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Siz emredin, en iyi ogmentlerimizi takalım Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: "Auf Euer Zeichen statten wir Euch mit unseren besten Augmentationen aus, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Just say the word and we'll fit you with our finest augments, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Auf Euer Zeichen statten wir Euch mit unseren besten Augmentationen aus, Lord Captain!"
